name: HUDOC — ECHR Case-Law Database
description: HUDOC is the official ECHR case-law database containing judgments, decisions, advisory opinions, and legal summaries from the European Court of Human Rights.
publisher: European Court of Human Rights (Council of Europe)

name: bioRxiv / medRxiv API
description: REST API providing metadata for bioRxiv and medRxiv preprint manuscripts, including author, funder, publication, and usage statistics.

name: SEC EDGAR Company Tickers
description: Flat JSON mapping of all SEC-registered companies to their CIK numbers and exchange ticker symbols.
publisher: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) EDGAR

name: Treasury Debt to the Penny
description: Daily snapshot of total US national debt outstanding to the penny, broken down by debt held by the public and intragovernmental holdings.
publisher: U.S. Department of the Treasury, Bureau of the Fiscal Service

name: Healthcare Provider Cost Reporting Information System (HCRIS)
description: Annual hospital cost reports submitted to CMS containing detailed financial, utilization, and staffing data for Medicare-participating hospitals.

name: CMS Nursing Home Care Compare Datasets
description: CMS Nursing Home Care Compare datasets covering quality ratings, staffing, inspections, and care outcomes for Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing facilities across the US.

name: Ecuador SERCOP Public Procurement OCDS
description: Ecuador national public procurement data published in OCDS format, covering pre-contractual and contractual phases across SOCE, health, and school-feeding procurement systems from 2015 to present.
publisher: Servicio Nacional de Contratación Pública de Ecuador (SERCOP)

name: Federal Register Documents
description: Paginated JSON API returning the most recent Federal Register documents including rules, proposed rules, notices, and presidential documents.
publisher: Office of the Federal Register, National Archives and Records Administration (NARA)

name: FDA Drug Enforcement Reports (Recalls)
description: FDA drug enforcement reports tracking voluntary and mandatory drug recalls, including product details, reason for recall, classification, and distribution scope.

name: Born in Slavery: Slave Narratives from the Federal Writers' Project, 1936–1938
description: Typewritten manuscripts, photographs, and audio recordings of interviews with formerly enslaved people conducted by the Federal Writers' Project between 1936 and 1938.
publisher: Library of Congress / Federal Writers' Project (WPA)

name: Mapping Inequality: Redlining in New Deal America v3
description: HOLC residential security maps and area descriptions for ~200 US cities, digitized and georeferenced, documenting 1930s federal redlining grades (A–D) by neighborhood.
publisher: University of Richmond Digital Scholarship Lab (source data: Home Owners' Loan Corporation, 1935–1940)

name: NOAA Marine Cadastre Nationwide AIS
description: Daily ZIP-packaged CSV files of Automatic Identification System (AIS) vessel position and voyage data for 2024 covering US waters, published by NOAA Marine Cadastre.

name: Spain BORME (Boletín Oficial del Registro Mercantil)
description: Spain's Official Mercantile Registry Gazette, publishing daily corporate acts including incorporations, dissolutions, capital changes, and appointments of directors for Spanish companies.
publisher: Agencia Estatal Boletín Oficial del Estado (AEBOE)

name: Revolving Door Project Personnel Map and Trump Administration Trackers
description: Maps corporate-sector connections to individual political appointees across federal executive-branch positions, linking economic sectors to regulatory and enforcement roles.

name: NPPES National Plan and Provider Enumeration System
description: Monthly full-replacement and weekly incremental ZIP files of all active NPI records for US healthcare providers, including individual practitioners and organizations.

name: Italy ISTAT Statistics API (IstatData/SDMX)
description: Machine-to-machine access to Italy's official statistical datasets via SDMX REST/SOAP web services, covering demographics, economy, labour, trade, environment, and censuses.

name: CFPB Consumer Complaints
description: Consumer complaints about financial products and services filed with the CFPB.

name: Treasury Average Interest Rates
description: Monthly average interest rates on US Treasury debt securities by security type and description, as published by the Bureau of the Fiscal Service.
publisher: U.S. Department of the Treasury, Bureau of the Fiscal Service

name: ClinicalTrials.gov API + AACT
description: Registry and results database for publicly and privately funded clinical studies conducted around the world, accessible via REST API and the AACT relational bulk download.
publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine (NLM) / National Institutes of Health (NIH)

name: DOJ False Claims Act Settlements and Judgments
description: DOJ False Claims Act civil settlements and judgments, including qui tam recoveries, against individuals and companies that defrauded the federal government.
publisher: U.S. Department of Justice, Civil Division, Fraud Section

name: Supreme Court Database (SCDB)
description: Comprehensive database of U.S. Supreme Court cases and individual justice votes from 1946 to present, organized by citation, docket, issue, or legal provision.
publisher: Washington University Law / Harold J. Spaeth

name: Ember Yearly and Monthly Electricity Data
description: Yearly electricity generation, capacity, emissions, imports and demand data for 200+ geographies, updated twice monthly.

name: FARA eFile Bulk Data
description: Bulk downloads of all FARA registrant, foreign principal, short-form registrant, and registrant document URL records maintained by the DOJ.
publisher: U.S. Department of Justice – FARA Unit

name: Oyez Project
description: Multimedia archive of U.S. Supreme Court oral arguments, case summaries, justice profiles, and full-text opinions from 1955-present
publisher: Oyez (Cornell LII, Justia, Chicago-Kent College of Law)

name: FDIC Failed Banks
description: List of all FDIC-insured banks that have failed since 1934, including closure date, acquiring institution, and estimated loss to the deposit insurance fund.

name: IPC Global Acute Food Insecurity Country Data
description: This IS the famine angle. Quantifies catastrophic food insecurity (Phase 5/Famine) and emergency (Phase 4) populations for Sudan and Darfur down to the analysis-area level — the data behind the 'famine confirmed in El Fasher/Kadugli' headlines, with official projections. Direct stable HDX download URLs (e.g. .../download/ipc_global_national_long_latest.csv) — no HDX login or API key needed; curl with a normal User-Agent works (the human-facing dataset PAGE 403s automated fetchers, but the CKAN resource download URLs are open). Choose granularity: national, level1 (admin1 — gives Darfur states), or area (IPC analysis units incl. El Fasher town, IDP camps). 'long' = tidy one-row-per-phase (recommended for Snowflake); 'wide' pivots phases to columns. Country code is ISO3 in the 'Country' column. Phase 5 = Famine — Sudan latest shows 134,808 (current) projected to 199,713. Percentage column
publisher: Integrated Food Security Phase Classification (IPC) / FAO-hosted partnership

name: US State Cannabis Policy Bundles Dataset
description: US State Cannabis Policy Bundles Dataset — issue #74 federalism.

name: OWID — Refugee population by country of origin
description: OWID — Refugee population by country of origin — issue #21 refugees.

name: CDC Indicators of Anxiety or Depression
description: CDC Indicators of Anxiety or Depression — issue #31 mental health.

name: CDC VSRR Provisional Drug Overdose Death Counts
description: CDC VSRR Provisional Drug Overdose Death Counts — issue #48 drug deaths.

name: NADAC — National Average Drug Acquisition Cost
description: The true acquisition-cost benchmark: what pharmacies actually pay per unit, by NDC. Lets Ripple compare Medicare/Medicaid reimbursement and negotiated prices against real cost — the markup/overpayment story. Carries clean NDC, unlike Part D Spending. Cleanest of the three. Direct CSV per week/year, e.g. https://download.medicaid.gov/data/nadac-national-average-drug-acquisition-cost-MM-DD-YYYY.csv, or pull the whole year via datastore: GET https://data.medicaid.gov/api/1/datastore/query/{distributionId}/0?limit=N&offset=N (distribution id b3b205f4-... for 2024). Columns: ndc, ndc_description, nadac_per_unit, pricing_unit, effective_date, classification_for_rate_setting (brand/generic), otc, pharmacy_type_indicator, corresponding_generic_drug_nadac_per_unit, as_of_date. NDC is the steel join key to FDA NDC, Part D, RxNorm. One dataset per calendar year — loop years for full history. Datast

name: OWID — Gini index (income inequality)
description: OWID — Gini index (income inequality) — issue #15 inequality.

name: OWID — Global temperature anomaly
description: OWID — Global temperature anomaly — issue #24 climate.

name: CDC NCHS Death rates for suicide by demographics
description: CDC NCHS Death rates for suicide by demographics — issue #31 mental health.

name: NCHS Drug Poisoning Mortality by County
description: NCHS Drug Poisoning Mortality by County — issue #48 drug deaths.

name: Washington Post Fatal Force database (v2)
description: The standard, citable incident-level record of who police killed by gunfire, where (lat/lon), by which agency (ORI) — the spine of any police-violence accountability investigation. Only covers fatal SHOOTINGS, not all use-of-force/killings (excludes Taser, in-custody, vehicle deaths). v2 schema: incident cols (id,date,body_camera,city,county,state,latitude,longitude,location_precision,name,age,gender,race,race_source,was_mental_illness_related,threat_type,armed_with,flee_status,agency_ids). agency_ids is a semicolon/space-delimited list that joins to id in the agencies CSV (one-to-many, needs unnest in staging). oricodes in agencies can hold multiple ORIs per agency. lat/lon often block-level (see location_precision). Use the /raw/refs/heads/master/ URL (web HTML page is 403 to WebFetch; raw blob is fine).

name: Ransomware.live — global ransomware victim tracker
description: The broadest globally-scoped tracker of actual ransomware attacks on organizations including critical-infrastructure sectors — the 'victims' side of the issue, and the only candidate giving worldwide coverage rather than US-only. Use the flat data.ransomware.live mirror for bulk loads — don't paginate the REST API (it's rate-limited and meant for lookups). Data is crowdsourced/derived from criminal leak sites, so victim names are self-reported by attackers and unverified (duplicate/typo'd org names, sector mislabels). 'sector' is loosely mapped (sometimes NAICS-ish, sometimes free text) — good for filtering critical-infra sectors (healthcare, energy, water, manufacturing) but clean it in staging. Country is attacker-claimed. Project is one person's infrastructure — has gone briefly offline before; mirror the file on each pull. Carries no firm registry ID, so cross-source joins are NAME/D

name: Annual reported AI incidents & controversies (AIID via AI Index)
description: Fastest possible first land for this issue and a clean 'AI incidents are accelerating' trend chart, sourced from the same AIID underneath rec #1. Trivial one-shot CSV (entity, year, count) — append ?v=1&csvType=full to get the full file. It's a derived aggregate, not the underlying incidents, so it's only useful as a headline trend line or a sanity cross-check against rec #1. Don't onboard this INSTEAD of AIID — onboard it alongside, or skip if you want depth over a quick win.
publisher: Our World in Data (processing AI Incident Database via Stanford AI Index Report 2026)

name: Our World in Data — Military Spending (SIPRI mirror)
description: Directly answers the 'China mil spend (SIPRI)' angle with clean, ISO-coded, ready-to-join time series. China's spend trajectory vs Taiwan/US/region is the core viz; ISO code lets it join to any country-keyed source in the Library. Single stable URL returns full long-format CSV; columns: entity, code (ISO-3, e.g. CHN/TWN), year, constant_usd, owid_region. Note OWID labels Taiwan code 'TWN' — verify it's present (China-political-sensitivity sometimes drops Taiwan in mirrors). Includes regional aggregate rows tagged '(SIPRI)' — filter them out for country-level marts. Only one metric (constant USD) per grapher; other SIPRI metrics (%GDP, per-capita, %govt) are separate OWID grapher URLs — onboard those as sibling tables if needed.
publisher: Our World in Data (data from SIPRI)

name: NOAA NCEI Storm Events Database (bulk CSV)
description: Best granular US extreme-weather IMPACT table: per-event fatalities, injuries, property/crop damage, hazard type, lat/lon and FIPS - the human/economic toll layer FEMA declarations don't capture. Strongest NEXT source to extend the issue. Filenames embed data year (d) and creation date (c), e.g. StormEvents_details-ftp_v1.0_dYYYY_cYYYYMMDD.csv.gz - scrape the directory index to resolve the latest c-stamp per year (c-date changes on revision; take the newest). DAMAGE_PROPERTY/DAMAGE_CROPS are TEXT with K/M/B suffixes ('2.5K','10.00M') - parse in staging, not landing. STATE_FIPS + CZ_FIPS need padding/joining; CZ_TYPE='Z' means NWS forecast zone (not a county FIPS) vs 'C'=county - don't blindly join Z-rows to county FIPS. Three files must be joined on EVENT_ID. Mirror also on source.coop (Earth Genome) if NCEI FTP is flaky.
publisher: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (NWS source data)

name: VA National Veteran Suicide Data Appendix 2021-2023
description: VA National Veteran Suicide Data Appendix 2021-2023 — issue #70 veteran suicide.

name: World Bank International Debt Statistics (IDS)
description: THE canonical source for developing-world sovereign/external debt — debt stocks, debt service, and a unique creditor-by-creditor (bilateral/multilateral/private) breakdown showing who each country owes. Directly answers 'global debt crisis' for the countries actually in crisis. USE THE BULK CSV, not the API, for the full panel. The Data API v2 path is /v2/sources/6/country/{ISO3}/series/{SERIES}/time/all?format=json and it explodes on the Counterpart-Area dimension — a single Ghana+DT.DOD.DECT.CD query returned 19,152 rows (counterpart x time) and ~6,384 pages. For a clean country panel filter Counterpart-Area=WLD (all creditors). Series codes are WDI-style (e.g. DT.DOD.DECT.CD = total external debt stocks; DT.TDS.DECT.CD = total debt service). Only low- and middle-income countries are covered (no high-income/G7 debtors). Years run 1970-2032; 2025+ are projection/null placeholders — drop
publisher: World Bank (Development Data Group / Debtor Reporting System)

name: OWID — Fertility rate (children per woman)
description: OWID — Fertility rate (children per woman) — issue #47 aging.

name: CNS North Korea Missile Test Database (Nuclear Threat Initiative / James Martin Center for Nonproliferation Studies)
description: Directly answers the issue — it is THE authoritative chronology of every DPRK missile flight test 1984-present (missile family, outcome, apogee/range, launch site geocoded), which is exactly the CSIS/NTI missile-test data the angle asks for, and it is the cleanest onboardable form of it. Header row is row 2 (row 1 is blank); 'Missile Tests' sheet dims A1:S305 with first real data at row 3. 19 columns incl. F1 id, Date, Date Entered/Updated, Launch Time (UTC), Missile Name, Missile Type (SRBM/MRBM/IRBM/ICBM/SLV), Launch Agency, Facility Name, Facility Location, Other Name, Facility Latitude, Facility Longitude, Landing Location (mostly text/'Unknown'), Apogee, Distance Travelled, Confirmation Status, Test Outcome, Additional Information, Source(s). Many numeric-ish fields ('Apogee','Distance Travelled','Landing Location') are free-text incl. 'Unknown' — keep as TEXT in landing, parse in s
publisher: Nuclear Threat Initiative (NTI) / CNS, Middlebury Institute

name: Russian Operations Against Europe Dataset
description: Russian Operations Against Europe Dataset — issue #4 Russia-NATO hybrid war.

name: Vera Institute — Incarceration Trends (county)
description: Vera Institute — Incarceration Trends (county) — issue #53 mass incarceration.

name: OWID — Homicide rate (UNODC)
description: OWID — Homicide rate (UNODC) — issue #48 crime.

name: OWID — Fossil fuel share of primary energy
description: OWID — Fossil fuel share of primary energy — issue #28 fossil fuels.

name: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog
description: Authoritative list of CVEs with reliable evidence of active in-the-wild exploitation. Carries a known-ransomware-campaign flag and federal due dates. Catalog version 2026.06.25.

name: SEC Financial Statement Data Sets
description: SEC Financial Statement Data Sets

name: United Nations General Assembly Voting Data (Voeten)
description: United Nations General Assembly Voting Data (Voeten) — issue #11 multilateralism.

name: OWID — Corruption Perceptions Index (TI)
description: OWID — Corruption Perceptions Index (TI) — issue #38 corruption.

name: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) Global
description: Geo-coded, dated events of organized violence worldwide (1989-present) with best/low/high fatality estimates by side. Keyless, openly licensed conflict backbone. GED Global v251.
publisher: Uppsala Conflict Data Program, Uppsala University

name: CDC Mapping Injury, Overdose, and Violence - County
description: CDC Mapping Injury, Overdose, and Violence - County — issue #51 gun violence.

name: OWID — Life expectancy
description: OWID — Life expectancy — issue #47 aging.

name: OWID — Terrorism deaths
description: OWID — Terrorism deaths — issue #39 extremism.

name: OWID — Annual CO2 emissions by country
description: OWID — Annual CO2 emissions by country — issue #24 climate.

name: FBI NICS Firearm Background Checks (Data Liberation Project CSV mirror)
description: Cleanest structured gun-commerce signal in this issue: state x month firearm demand 1998-present, the standard proxy for gun sales and the volume side of the ATF commerce story - loads in one pull. FBI publishes ONLY as PDF; this mirror is the de-facto structured version (DLP converts the PDF monthly). Verified live: HTTP 200, 1,411,489 bytes, header confirmed. Wide format with 24 check-type count columns + totals; state name is the join key (map to FIPS in staging). HARD CAVEAT for any narrative: a background check is NOT a gun sale (permit rechecks, multi-gun checks, CCW renewals inflate counts) - proxy, not a sales count. Pin commit/date in _SRC_SHA256 since the file is append-mostly but historical rows can be revised.
publisher: FBI CJIS (source) via Data Liberation Project (CSV maintainer)

name: nagix/nk-missile-tests — North Korea missile flight tests (JSON, CNS-derived + landing geocoding)
description: Best enrichment layer for the same issue: gives launch bearings and computed landing points (impact geography) plus coverage through 2026, filling the one real gap in the NTI file (no landing coordinates). Nested JSON: records live under timeBins[].data[], so flatten with pandas.json_normalize(record_path=['timeBins','data']) or a manual loop. Foreign-keyed by slug — missile/facility/satellite are codes ('scud-b','tonghae') that must be joined to missile.en.json / facility.en.json to get human names + facility lat/lon. Adds a 'bearing' field and computed landing geometry the NTI base file lacks (good for spatial viz of impact points). It is a DERIVED mirror, not the primary source — onboard NTI as the system of record and use this only to enrich landing coordinates/bearing.
publisher: Akihiko Kusanagi (nagix), derived from CNS/NTI data

name: VA All-Cause Mortality Data Appendix 2018-2023
description: VA All-Cause Mortality Data Appendix 2018-2023 — issue #70 veteran care.

name: Our World in Data — Estimated nuclear warhead stockpiles (FAS Nuclear Notebook)
description: Frictionless proliferation-context dataset (who has warheads, how many, over time) — but does not cover Iran directly; weak on the specific issue, strong as scene-setting. Dead-simple one-URL CSV with ISO-3 codes — but Iran is NOT in it (it's weapons states only: US, RU, CN, FR, UK, IN, PK, IL, KP, ZA + World). So it's a CONTEXT/proxy layer for the proliferation issue, not Iran data. Use it to frame the global arsenal backdrop, not to answer the Iran-specific ask. OWID grapher CSVs are stable but version param (?v=) can change; fetch the base path.
publisher: Our World in Data; underlying data Federation of American Scientists (Kristensen/Korda et al.)

name: CMS Care Compare — Hospice General Information
description: CMS Care Compare — Hospice General Information

name: CMS Provider of Services — Hospital & Non-Hospital Facilities
description: CMS Provider of Services — Hospital & Non-Hospital Facilities

description: CMS Care Compare — Long-Term Care Hospital General Information

name: CMS Care Compare — Home Health Agencies
description: CMS Care Compare — Home Health Agencies

name: CMS Doctors & Clinicians — Facility Affiliation (NPI↔CCN crosswalk)
description: CMS Doctors & Clinicians — Facility Affiliation (NPI↔CCN crosswalk)

name: USASpending — Federal Prime Contract Awards
description: Prime contract award transactions (2024-10-01..2025-09-30), curated columns (company IDs UEI/DUNS/CAGE, parent, geography, NAICS, exec comp, permalink).

name: CMS Care Compare — Hospital General Information
description: CMS Care Compare — Hospital General Information

name: CMS Care Compare — Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility General Information
description: CMS Care Compare — Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility General Information

name: EPA ECHO Exporter (Facility-level Enforcement & Compliance)
description: EPA ECHO Exporter (Facility-level Enforcement & Compliance)

name: DOJ Epstein Library — File Manifest
description: Monthly snapshot of every file link the DOJ Epstein Library lists publicly (disclosures index + 12 dataset pages). Metadata only — names, URLs, link text, page of origin — never the documents themselves. Snapshots over time show what appeared, what vanished, and what changed.

name: GovInfo BILLSTATUS -- Bill Status XML (sponsor, cosponsors, actions, laws)
description: Official bill-status records for every measure: bill type/number, congress, sponsor (bioguideId), cosponsor list, full action history, latest action, and the <laws> element present ONLY when the bill became law (public-law number). One XML file per bill, bulk by congress. The clean legislative-output leg -- sponsor AND cosponsor carry bioguide, so it joins straight to the member spine with no fuzzy matching.

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Independent Expenditures (Schedule E)
description: Outside spending FOR or AGAINST candidates (Schedule E independent expenditures): who spent, how much, supporting or opposing which candidate. SUP_OPP flags the direction. The source-of-truth for outside for/against (never derived by summing pas2 24A/24E).

name: OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) List
description: OFAC SDN sanctions list (individuals, entities, vessels). Vessel rows carry a derived 7-digit IMO.
publisher: U.S. Treasury — Office of Foreign Assets Control

name: Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners - by Provider
description: Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners - by Provider

name: FEC Bulk Data - Committee Master (2024)
description: FEC Bulk Data - Committee Master (2024)

name: Freedom in the World — All Data (aggregate + category scores)
description: The canonical annual freedom-status scorecard with disaggregated political-rights / civil-liberties sub-scores back to 2013 (status back to 1973) — the second pillar of any backsliding story, and directly downloadable now. Direct .xlsx (verified live, 488KB, no login). Hard-coded year-folder in the URL changes each release — parameterize it or scrape the report page for the current link. Header rows are messy (merged cells, two header rows; sub-indicator codes A1..G4 across columns) — read with pandas skiprows/header=[0,1] then flatten. Country names need a name->ISO crosswalk to get a clean COUNTRY join key (no ISO column). The 1973-2024 ratings file is a separate workbook with one sheet per year-block; the 'All Data 2013-2024' file is the one with full category scores. Commercial-use restriction matters for the publishing layer.

name: CMS Care Compare — Dialysis Facility Listing
description: CMS Care Compare — Dialysis Facility Listing

name: IRS Automatic Revocation of Exemption List (Auto-Revocation)
description: IRS Automatic Revocation of Exemption List (Auto-Revocation)
publisher: Internal Revenue Service (IRS) - Tax Exempt Organization Search (TEOS)

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Candidate-Committee Linkage (ccl.txt)
description: The official link table between FEC candidate IDs and committee IDs (which committees are authorized by / linked to which candidate). The clean cand<->cmte bridge.

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Itemized Individual Contributions (itcont) -- the 84M-row firehose
description: Every itemized (>$200 aggregate) individual contribution to a federal committee: donor name, city/state/ZIP, EMPLOYER + OCCUPATION (free-text), amount, date, recipient committee, and the conduit (OTHER_ID) for earmarked gifts. 84.2M rows, cycles 2024+2026. NO cycle column (the loader merged indiv24+indiv26) -- cycle is derived from TRANSACTION_DT (MMDDYYYY).

name: Congress -- Committee Membership (who chairs/sits on what)
description: Current committee + subcommittee membership for Congress: which member sits on / chairs which committee, with rank and role. bioguide-keyed (joins straight to the member spine).

name: USAspending Top-Tier Federal Agencies
description: Top-tier federal agencies with current fiscal-year budgetary resources, obligations, and outlays from the USAspending.gov reference API.

name: NARA Access to Archival Databases (AAD)
description: NARA's Access to Archival Databases (AAD) provides online search access to selected high-value electronic records transferred to the National Archives, spanning military, diplomatic, personnel, and other federal records.

name: CMS Open Payments — General Payments detail (PY2024)
description: CMS Open Payments — General Payments detail (PY2024)

name: Medicare Part D Prescribers - by Provider
description: Medicare Part D Prescribers - by Provider

name: Wayback CDX Census — DOJ Epstein Library Listing Pages
description: Every Internet Archive capture of the DOJ Epstein Library listing pages since Nov 2025 — one row per capture with timestamp, HTTP status, and content digest. Digest changes between captures prove the page changed, attested by a third party. Reconstructs the months before Ripple started watching.

name: unitedstates/congress-legislators
description: Current + historical members of Congress and executives (presidents/VPs): bio, party, state, district, terms, AND the master ID crosswalk (bioguide/icpsr/fec/opensecrets/govtrack/votesmart/lis/thomas/wikidata/ballotpedia/cspan). The keystone for every join.

name: FEC Bulk Data -- All Candidates Financial Summary (weball)
description: Per-candidate-per-cycle financial summary: total receipts (money raised), disbursements, cash-on-hand, transfers from/to authorized committees, individual contributions, loans, debts. The ONLY FEC bulk file carrying dollar amounts -- the source of the money-raised stat.

name: MEDSL -- U.S. President state-level returns
description: State-level U.S. presidential returns, one row per candidate-per-state-per-year. The 'who won each state' geographic layer (no member-of-Congress join -- president is not in the bioguide spine).
publisher: MIT Election Data + Science Lab (Harvard Dataverse / GitHub)

name: NAAG Multistate AG Settlements (1980-present)
description: Canonical searchable listing of multistate settlements concluded by state Attorneys General from 1980 to the present. Each row carries defendants, date resolved, total settlement amount, state/federal shares, lead and participating AGs (with party breakdown), industry/NAICS, issue area, and enforcement campaign. Sourced from the Ninja Tables get-all-data JSON feed behind the searchable table (table_id=1166), NOT page chrome.
publisher: National Association of Attorneys General (NAAG) / State Litigation and AG Activity Database

name: SlaveVoyages — Intra-American Slave Trade Database
description: Voyage-level database of the intra-American (Americas-to-Americas) slave trade, ~1550-1888. One row = one documented slaving voyage with ship, captain(s), embarkation/arrival ports and regions, captives embarked and disembarked, voyage fate, dates, and source citation. 11,521 voyages, 169 variables (dataset I-Am 1.0).

name: CDC Indicators of Health Insurance Coverage
description: CDC Indicators of Health Insurance Coverage — issue #32 healthcare access.

name: Voteview -- Congressional Member Ideology (DW-NOMINATE)
description: Member-by-congress ideology scores (DW-NOMINATE dim1/dim2) plus member bio, keyed by ICPSR. The 'ideology' stat for the spine. Small member file (HSall_members.csv); the full member-by-vote matrix is a separate, much larger file (registered as fed_voteview_rollcalls).

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Committee Master (cm.txt), 2026 refresh
description: Every FEC-registered committee: committee ID, name, treasurer, address, designation, type, party, filing frequency, connected org, and linked candidate ID -- by cycle. The committee dimension the candidate->committee linkages resolve against. This is the 2026 (cm26) cycle snapshot, landed additively beside the existing 2024 committee master (fed_fec_bulk) to close the Phase-2 2026 linkage-resolution gap (2026 resolved only ~57% vs ~98% for 2024).

name: FHFA House Price Index (HPI) — Master File
description: The authoritative US house-price trend series, free and keyless, at every geography down to census tract — the price half of housing affordability, joinable by FIPS/ZIP straight onto redlining, ACS, and rents. Master CSV mixes geographic levels and index types in one file — split on the level/index-type columns in staging. County/ZIP/tract series are annual only; monthly is national+division only. 'place_id' is FHFA's own code, not raw FIPS for every level — derive FIPS for county/tract, ZIP for ZIP series; map MSA codes to CBSA. Some early periods have nulls/HPI=100 base. Index values are unitless (1980/1991/1995 bases differ by series), not dollars — needs a base-period note in the mart.

name: FDIC Enforcement Decisions and Orders
description: FDIC enforcement decisions and orders against banks, companies, and individuals including cease-and-desist orders, civil money penalties, removal/prohibition orders, and other regulatory actions.

name: Ireland CRO Open Data Portal
description: Ireland's official open data portal for company registrations, financials, and related corporate filings published by the CRO.

name: OpenSanctions Consolidated Sanctions (Targets, Simplified CSV)
description: OpenSanctions Consolidated Sanctions (Targets, Simplified CSV)

name: Judicial Common Space -- court/institution ideology medians
description: Yearly median-ideology series for SCOTUS, each circuit, House, Senate and president on the common scale (the 'where is the median voter across institutions' series).
publisher: Epstein, Martin, Segal & Westerland (Washington U. in St. Louis)

name: DOJ Civil Rights Division Cases and Settlements Database
description: DOJ Civil Rights Division database of cases and matters across enforcement sections including disability, housing, voting, employment, and special litigation.
publisher: U.S. Department of Justice, Civil Rights Division

name: List of Excluded Individuals and Entities (LEIE)
description: All individuals and entities currently excluded from participating in Medicare, Medicaid, and other federal health programs, with exclusion type and dates.

name: Switzerland Zefix Central Business Name Index
description: Switzerland's central business name index (Zefix) providing structured data on all registered Swiss companies via a public REST API.

name: CMS Open Payments PY2023 - General Payments (Detailed)
description: CMS Open Payments PY2023 - General Payments (Detailed)

name: MEDSL -- U.S. Senate constituency returns (1976-2024)
description: State-level U.S. Senate general-election returns, one row per candidate-per-race-per-year: votes, total votes, party, special-election flag, runoff stage. The cleaned canonical 'who won the Senate' source. NO FEC/ICPSR in the file -- winner joins to the member spine by name+state (fuzzy).
publisher: MIT Election Data + Science Lab (Harvard Dataverse)

name: FJC Biographical Directory of Article III Federal Judges -- Federal Judicial Service
description: Normalized appointment records for every Article III judgeship: Court Type/Name, Appointing President + party, nomination/confirmation dates, Senate Ayes/Nays, commission and termination. One row per (nid, appointment sequence).

name: Greece General Electronic Commercial Registry (GEMI)
description: Greece General Electronic Commercial Registry (GEMI) — public search portal for Greek registered companies including legal status, formation/closure dates, legal form, and local registry office.
publisher: Κεντρική Ένωση Επιμελητηρίων Ελλάδος (Central Union of Chambers of Greece)

name: FAOSTAT Suite of Food Security Indicators (bulk)
description: The baseline chronic-hunger dataset: prevalence of undernourishment and food-insecurity scales by country over 60+ years. Sets the structural context that IPC's acute spikes sit on top of. IMPORTANT: use the keyless bulk-download ZIP (bulks-faostat.fao.org), NOT the FAOSTAT developer API — the API now requires a JWT bearer token that expires every 60 minutes. ZIP serves clean from S3/CloudFront (HTTP 200). This is CHRONIC hunger (Prevalence of Undernourishment, Food Insecurity Experience Scale, dietary energy supply) — annual and slow-moving, complements IPC's acute crisis data. Country codes are FAO's M49-based 'Area Code' + 3-letter 'Area Code (M49)'; map to ISO3 for joins. Aggregates ('World', 'Africa') are mixed into the rows — filter them out in staging. There's a separate FAOSTAT data-source already scouted as intl_fao_faostat — recommend this as the food-security-specific sub-doma
publisher: FAO (Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations)

name: IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File (EO BMF)
description: Full roster of US tax-exempt organizations -- EIN, name, NTEE code, subsection, foundation/status codes, asset/income/revenue. The IRS side of the EIN bridge (#50). Concatenated from the 4 regional eo1-4.csv extracts.

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Candidate Master (cn.txt)
description: Every FEC-registered candidate: FEC candidate ID, name, office sought, party, state, district, incumbent/challenger status, by cycle. The cand_id<->name<->office anchor for the fec bridge.

name: Voteview -- Roll-Call Metadata
description: Per-roll-call metadata (one row per roll-call): date, session, yea/nay counts, result, vote question, bill number. The denominator + context for the votes matrix.

name: FEC Bulk Data -- Committee-to-Candidate (pas2/itpas2)
description: Committee contributions TO (and independent expenditures for/against) candidates: PAC/party money to a candidate, by transaction type. Carries CAND_ID + CMTE_ID + CYCLE. The PAC-money leg of the box score.

name: MEDSL -- U.S. House constituency returns (district level)
description: District-level U.S. House general-election returns, one row per candidate-per-district-per-year. The 'who won the House' source. NO FEC/ICPSR -- winner joins to member by name+state+district.
publisher: MIT Election Data + Science Lab (Harvard Dataverse / GitHub)

name: Judicial Common Space -- Courts of Appeals judge ideology
description: JCS lifetime ideology score for US Courts of Appeals judges, by circuit.
publisher: Epstein, Martin, Segal & Westerland (Washington U. in St. Louis)

name: Records About Japanese Americans Relocated During World War II (NARA AAD Series 623)
description: NARA AAD Series 623: records about Japanese Americans relocated and interned during World War II, including personal and geographic information about individuals processed through relocation camps.

name: Voteview -- Roll-Call Votes (member-by-vote matrix)
description: Every recorded roll-call vote, member-by-member (the large matrix): HSall_votes.csv + HSall_rollcalls.csv. The raw material for missed-votes, party-unity, vote-similarity stats.

name: GovInfo BILLSTATUS -- Cosponsor Extract
description: The cosponsor list flattened out of GovInfo BILLSTATUS: one row per (bill, cosponsor bioguide) with the original-cosponsor flag, sponsorship date, and the withdrawn date (present only when a cosponsorship was withdrawn). Kept as a separate table so the list never inflates the one-row-per-bill grain.

name: FJC Biographical Directory of Article III Federal Judges -- Judges
description: The authoritative directory of every Article III federal judge (district, circuit, Supreme Court), 1789-present: name, demographics (gender, race/ethnicity), birth/death, keyed on the FJC nid. The judge dimension of the judiciary spine.

name: Judicial Common Space -- SCOTUS justice ideology
description: DW-NOMINATE-scale ideology (JCS) for every Supreme Court justice by term, 1937-2022. One row per (justice, term).
publisher: Epstein, Martin, Segal & Westerland (Washington U. in St. Louis)
